Right now, in this room,
it's just me and you.
It feels as if we've been isolated.
On the desk, scattered notes and data are lying around. I wonder how these will be used in any articles.
As usual, he seems to have no intention of offering me a seat.
I feel like a student being called out and scolded in the staff room.
Will this face ever show a gentle smile?
Hehe, he's a good-looking guy no matter how you look at him.
Thank you very much.
Oh, this
Isn’t it nice to be told that?
I don't have that kind of energy.
Oh, if you just told me, I could cheer you up anytime.
I really want to know more about you.
I don’t want to be known that much.
Oh dear, being passive isn't good.
Unlike others, I'm a modest person.
Oh really?
Is that so? I didn’t know that.
One day, I will have you, just like you had your inheritance.
Oh no, you're still saying that.
There’s no one like that.
You never said there wasn't anyone until now.
But there really isn't anyone.
Yeah.
I'm telling you, there's really no one.
You're really persistent.
Hey, have I told you that Guy went traveling?
How do you know about that?
Oh, you got your information from a different source. That's frustrating.
I heard it directly from him.
Oh, is that so?
Yeah, they were best friends after all.
I heard it from you the other day.
Ah, that's right. I completely forgot.
Do you want to know where Gai went on his trip?
Of course. If you know, I'd like you to tell me.
Then won't you provide me with information that matches it?
Information that matches it? What exactly do you hope for?
The background of why you had to drop out and how you snagged your grandfather's inheritance.
What?!
You're quite interesting. When I look into it, fascinating facts keep popping up.
What I know about Gai.
There's a lot, you know. Hehe.
Is the young lady of the Dern family doing well?
That doesn't concern you.
Ah.
Well, you don't have to say it so coldly.
I wonder if she read the article?
So what if she did?
I was just thinking about what it felt like when she did.
You know.
That shouldn't concern you, right?
Oh, that's not true. Since I'm getting my revenge for being bullied, I'm curious about your reaction.
I want to see her get hurt.
Hehe.
What kind of nerve do you have?
Well, it's not something to get worked up over, is it?
Could it be that you like her?
Don't worry, I won't write about Gai for a while.
Is that so?
Unfortunately. For now, there's nothing to write about.
From now on,
I'll focus on the article.
Have you been researching this the whole time?
Yes. I can't stand people who do things like that. So, I'm planning to keep pursuing it until the culprit is caught.
Keep pursuing it?
That's right. I'm going to challenge the killer with a pen. It's pathetic to mutilate weak opponents, you know.
You see, I'm not a gossip writer, despite how I look.
While writing gossip, I'm also chasing after it?
Is that what you're saying?
Yes, exactly. I hate that kind of criminal, so I want to pursue it thoroughly.
In a way, it's extremely dangerous.
If you’re scared of that, you won’t survive in New York.
By the way, the killer has landed in New York.
You’re talking about it like it’s someone else's problem, but aren’t you scared?
Scared? Why would I be scared?
You're still a young woman, right?
Hehe, thanks. But I'm fine. This killer only targets weak girls.
A killer who mutilates women is the lowest scumbag.
I was fixated on the person who provided the source for Guy's article, but perhaps such a person doesn’t exist.
Or,
it’s also very possible that
someone is directly getting information from Guy and writing articles.
Who knows Guy's travel destinations and his current situation?
Does anyone know where Guy is headed?
And what is the relationship with Guy?
Could it be that Guy’s partner isn't Cindy?
I haven’t met her yet,
but has she regained her sanity?
I'm concerned, but witnessing her in that state is
too painful.
If
he finds out about her situation,
he would definitely write an article about it.
That’s something I must avoid.
It looks like there won’t be any articles related to Guy for a while. That reduces one worry.
I hope no articles about Guy come out for now.
It seems like she has been chasing from the start.
If so, she might have completed her own profiling of the perpetrator.
Or maybe not.
However, with the perpetrator appearing in New York now, if she writes an article that provokes him,
isn't her life in danger?
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
